transcription.text: Once upon a time, there were three beautiful mannequins who lived in a little boutique. Every day, they were dressed in the most beautiful clothes in the world, and they should have been very happy. But alas, they were very sad, because something was always missing. A different watch for every different look they wore. And so, one night, when they were all alone, all of our story is, we haven't met a girl yet who doesn't think the Timex wardrobe of watches is a fabulous idea. Especially at Timex Pro.

segments.text: Once upon a time, there were three beautiful mannequins who lived in a little boutique.
Every day, they were dressed in the most beautiful clothes in the world, and they should have been very happy.
But alas, they were very sad, because something was always missing.
A different watch for every different look they wore.
And so, one night, when they were all alone, all of our story is, we haven't met a girl yet who doesn't think the Timex wardrobe of watches is a fabulous idea.
